children.text: issue guidance requiring a discussion of risk, the potential impacts of risk on program costs, and approaches to mitigate risk in cost estimates for major defense acquisition programs and major subprograms;

ensure that cost estimates are developed, to the extent practicable, based on historical actual cost information that is based on demonstrated contractor and Government performance and that such estimates provide a high degree of confidence that the program or subprogram can be completed without the need for significant adjustment to program budgets; and

children.label: A
children.text: in any decision documentation approving a cost estimate within the baseline description or any other cost estimate for use at any event specified in ; andsection 3221(b)(6) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: in the next Selected Acquisition Report pursuant to in the case of a major defense acquisition program or major subprogram.section 4351 of this title
